prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2300 TVS twin-screw blower (replacing the stock Eaton M112) on the AJ-V8 Gen III 4.2L supercharged engine (engine code: AJ34S), paired with a custom 3.5" pulley system and a Lingenfelter high-flow water-to-air intercooler for sustained 550+ WHP on 93 octane with a supporting fuel system (Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH pump, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator).

Full bolt-on exhaust system featuring a custom X-pipe setup with 3" stainless steel piping, MagnaFlow Competition Series mufflers (part #14815), and ceramic-coated headers (JBA Cat4ward headers, part #JBA3216) to optimize scavenging and reduce backpressure while maintaining OEM catalytic converter functionality for emissions compliance.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (part #35231001) featuring 8-position rebound and 16-position compression damping, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0115K) to eliminate subframe flex and improve turn-in response for the S-Type R's unique multi-link rear suspension geometry.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Wald International #186 "Black Bison" kit, modified to fit the S-Type R's longer wheelbase with custom fender flares (3" front, 4" rear) and integrated carbon fiber side skirts with LED turn signal repeaters (Osram LEDriving SL 101).

Custom front bumper lip spoiler from Prior Design (PD-SJ1) with integrated DRLs (Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED bulbs) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon CF-STYPR-DIFF) featuring dual 3.5" exhaust cutouts to accommodate the MagnaFlow setup, all painted in Jaguar Racing Green (code: 47B) with satin clear coat.

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #29106) wrapped in Bridge of Weir Nappa leather (color: Ebony with Racing Green stitching), a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede with green contrast stitching), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (Seibon CF-STYPR-DASH) with a relocated Alpine iLX-F509 9" touchscreen head unit (replacing the stock nav system).
